introSection: Descente en Schlitt' is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Nigloland in Dolancourt, Grand Est, France. It was built by Mack Rides and opened on 6 May 2007. The ride was originally known as Schlitt'Express.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The layout is a compact, mobile, wild mouse model from Mack Rides. The model features sharp turns, unexpected drops, and brake runs. The paint color is dark brown track with lighter-brown supports.

fullText:
Descente en Schlitt' is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Nigloland in Dolancourt, Grand Est, France. It was built by Mack Rides and opened on 6 May 2007. The ride was originally known as Schlitt'Express.

The layout is a compact, mobile, wild mouse model from Mack Rides. The model features sharp turns, unexpected drops, and brake runs. The paint color is dark brown track with lighter-brown supports.

The cars look like mine-carts.
